overall.description: A first-person walk through a cyberpunk city street at dusk, featuring neon-lit buildings, holographic advertisements, and futuristic architecture. The player character walks past a female pedestrian in purple clothing and continues toward an open intersection. The footage is from the video game Cyberpunk 2077, showcasing high-quality rendered graphics with atmospheric neon lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway with neon-lit cafe

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the elevated walkway, passing a neon-lit cafe on the left and approaching a pedestrian

notable_agents.action: female character in purple outfit with white hair walking toward and then past the camera

entered.detail: industrial building facade with prominent red neon strip lighting and illuminated signage
large glowing green holographic display showing a human figure mounted on a structure
tall industrial tower with antennas and structural elements silhouetted against the dusk sky
yellow and black striped metal railing running along the edge of the walkway

segments.scene_description: Walking along an elevated concrete walkway in a cyberpunk city district at dusk. A neon-lit cafe with red lighting occupies the left side while a large green holographic advertisement glows on the right. The camera approaches and passes a female pedestrian in a purple outfit walking in the opposite direction.

events.description: camera begins a slight right turn while continuing forward, opening up the view to the intersection

agents.ego_description: continuing forward with a slight right turn, approaching an open intersection area with distant city lights

notable_agents.action: male pedestrian in white shirt and dark pants walking across the path from right to left

entered.detail: tall building with bright illuminated digital billboard displaying red and white graphics

segments.scene_description: Moving past the cafe into a more open intersection area as the camera turns slightly right. The industrial tower shifts to the left side of the frame while a large digital billboard becomes visible on a distant building to the right. A male pedestrian crosses the path from right to left as the walkway opens up to the city beyond.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement through a dense cyberpunk district that gradually opens into a wide city intersection at dusk. It begins on an elevated concrete walkway, gliding past a red-lit neon cafe on the left and a glowing green holographic advertisement on the right. As the camera moves forward, it passes a female pedestrian in purple clothing before the path begins to widen. The scene then shifts as the camera turns slightly right, moving the industrial tower to the left of the frame and revealing a large digital billboard on a distant building. Finally, the walkway opens up to the city beyond as a male pedestrian crosses the path from right to left.
